Online Selling

26 Trending Products to Sell Online in Pakistan (2026)

By Fawad Hussain

Co-founder, Markaz

26 Trending Products to Sell Online in Pakistan

If you're a business owner in Pakistan, you know that it can be tough to stay ahead of the curve and keep up with changing trends. With rapid technological advancements and innovation in the country, consumer preferences are changing every day. It can be hard to forecast the right products to sell online in Pakistan.

That's why we've compiled a list of the 26 trending products in Pakistan 2024 to sell right now. So whether you're looking for new ideas or want to make sure you're not missing out on any big opportunities, read on for inspiration and get market-capturing products to sell online in Pakistan.

The Changing Trends of Products to Sell Online in Pakistan

There's no doubt that eCommerce is a booming industry and shows no signs of slowing down anytime soon. If you're a small business owner, it's crucial to stay up-to-date on the latest products to sell online in Pakistan. This is especially true in Pakistan, where the ecommerce market is witnessing rapid growth. 

By familiarizing yourself with the products that are trending online, you can ensure that your small business can compete in the ever-changing marketplace. What's more, you may even be able to find new and trending products in pakistan 2024 to sell that will attract customers to your business. 

So if you want to keep your small business thriving, make sure you stay abreast of the latest products to sell online in Pakistan. By staying up-to-date on the latest trends, you can ensure that your store always has the trending products in stock.

Get Products to Sell Online in Pakistan From The Markaz App

Most of the business owners are always on the lookout for the best products to sell online? The Markaz App is your one-stop shop for all your needs. With over 10,000 products available, you will be able to find everything you need to get started selling online.

Markaz Product Line

  1. Clothing
  2. Electronic Items
  3. Cosmetics
  4. Gadgets
  5. Home Decor
  6. Bedding
  7. Bags
  8. Islamic Accessories

Along with these main product lines, Markaz offers a wide range of products targeting every market in Pakistan. With the Markaz App’s features, resellers can start their business with zero initial investment and become market leaders in no time.

And best of all, the app delivers the products at PKR 90 across 1200+ cities in Pakistan through MNP, Trax, and Leopards. We manage your inventory, logistics, and delivery processes as you focus on what you do best- selling! So what are you waiting for? Get the top trending products from The Markaz App today!

Start Selling These 22 Trending Products Online

Are you looking for the best products to sell online? Take a look at our well-thought-out list and choose your target market accordingly.

1. Home Decor

Home decor is always in style, making it one of the unique products to sell online in Pakistan. Whether it's traditional or contemporary, there's a type of home decor to suit everyone's taste.

And with so many different rooms in a house, there's a lot of potential for selling home decor products. Every person is looking for home decor products to personalize their homes, and you can leverage this opportunity to scale your business growth.

Resellers can start by sourcing products from Markaz, which offers a wide range of home decor items at affordable prices starting from PKR 420. As well as being able to offer their customers a wide selection of products, resellers can also benefit from Markaz's inventory management and quick delivery services. Selling home decor is a great option if you are looking for a rewarding and profitable business opportunity,

2. Bedding

Bedding is always in high demand, but it has become especially popular in recent years as more and more people are looking for ways to improve their sleep quality.

As a result, selling bedding online has become a great way to earn a steady income. Not only is the market for bedding extremely large, but there are also many different types of bedding that you can sell, from standard sheets and blankets to more specialized products like mattress toppers and pillowcases. We recommend you focus on your niche and sell the products that are in demand. 

Best of all Markaz offers a wide range of bedding products by connecting resellers to the best wholesalers, making it easy to find the unique products to sell online in Pakistan. The bedding range at Markaz includes bedsheets, comforters, bridal sets, blankets, mattresses, and pillow covers. So if you're looking for a trending product to sell online, bedding is a great option.

3. Electronic Accessories

Electronic accessories are a great option if you're looking for a hot new product to sell online. They are trendy, practical, and appeal to a wide range of customers. Best of all, Markaz offers a wide selection of electronic accessories at affordable prices, making it easy to stock your store and make a profit.

Some of the most popular electronic accessories at Markaz include headphones, smart watches, speakers, chargers, power banks, and other mobile accessories. No matter what your customers need, we have the perfect solution.

4. Home Appliances

Home appliances are one of the most trending products in Pakistan. The reason is people are becoming more and more conscious about their homes. Thus, they are willing to invest in home appliances that make their lives easier.

Another benefit of selling home appliances online is that you can offer a wide range of products to your customers through the Markaz App. We have everything from juicers and blenders to irons and hair dryers. It allows resellers to cater to the needs of a wide range of customers.

5. Hardware and Tools

Another one of the unique products to sell online in Pakistan, hardware and tools are great choices. Not only do they offer a wide range of benefits, but they also tend to be high-quality items that customers are looking for. Markaz offers a wide range of hardware and tools, so you're sure to find the perfect products for your online store.

6. Stitched Clothes

Stitched clothes are a great product to sell online for several reasons. First, they are personal items that people are always in need of. Second, there is a wide range of stitched clothes available on the market, so sellers can find products to match any customer’s taste. Finally, selling stitched clothes online offers the opportunity to reach a global market. By using Markaz, sellers can reach a large audience and tap into a growing market for stitched clothes.

7. Bags

Bags are one of the unique products to sell online in Pakistanfor many reasons. They are highly versatile and can be used for a variety of purposes, from travel to school to work. Markaz offers a wide range of bag options including travel bags, school bags, waterproof bags, etc. You can find the perfect style to match your needs. We provide a bespoke customer experience so your customers can be confident in their purchases.

8. Cosmetics

Cosmetics are trending products for many reasons. They are relatively easy to ship and do not require specialized packaging. Moreover, there is a wide range of cosmetics available to cater to different audiences, meaning that there is something for everyone. For these reasons, selling cosmetics online can be a great way to reach a wide range of customers and generate sales. And at Markaz, we offer a wide range of cosmetic items at affordable delivery charges, making it easy for you to get started. 

9. Jewelry 

Jewelry is a popular choice for many online shoppers, and it's easy to see why. Whether you're looking for a special piece to commemorate a special occasion or you're simply treating yourself to something sparkly, there's no shortage of options to choose from. 

If you're thinking about selling jewelry online, there are a few things you should keep in mind. First, it's important to research the market and find out what styles and designs are popular with buyers. You'll also need to source high-quality products at competitive prices. And finally, make sure your website and marketing materials are professional and polished - first impressions count! At Markaz, we offer a wide range of necklaces, artificial sets, earrings, bracelets, and tikkas to our resellers. Start shopping with us today.

10. Children's Clothes

Children's clothes are one top trending products for online selling. Selling children's clothes is a good way to make extra money. Markaz offers a wide range of children's clothes to accelerate your clothing business. You can find everything from shirts and pants to dresses and shoes. Markaz also offers a variety of different brands, so you are sure to find the perfect outfit for your child. With so many benefits, it is no wonder that selling children's clothes is one of the top trending products online.

11. Graphics Cards

Moving on with our trending products to sell online recommendations, we’ve got Graphics cards.

With more than 30 million internet users, Pakistan has become one of the fastest-growing markets for e-commerce with increasing demand for digital goods and services. 

Moreover, with a population of over 197 million people and large untapped rural markets, this presents abundant prospects for tech heads to get their hands on items that resell for cheap rates.

GPUs, over the last 3 years, have drastically increased in cost. They are also among the trending products to sell in Pakistan, as there’s been an ever-growing demand for graphics cards in the country. Part of this demand curve is associated with the ‘best products to sell online in Pakistan’ analogy, and the rest of the reason is associated with the scarcity of this item.

Since there’s been a worldwide shortage of capacitors that go into the graphics card, the price of the cards themselves has increased. Hence labeling them as the most sought-out trending products to sell online. 

Pakistan aside, many worldwide retailers, and 3rd party sellers are selling used graphics cards, or refurbed cards at a heavy markup. This price is of course lower than the original GPU price, but it still nets a decent profit.

12. Stationery Items

Stationery items are next on our list of trending products to sell online. 

We are not just talking about pencils, geometry sets, and items that you could buy easily from your local retailer. 

Stationery items become trending products to sell when they have a certain degree of rarity to them. Think about selling art & drawing accessories that come from famous brands, such as Derwent, Staedtler, Conte’ and vice versa. They are a little hard to fetch for ordinary retailers, hence we can safely place them under the category of best products to sell online in Pakistan. 

13. Refurbed Products:

Lastly, we’ve got refurbed, or refurbished products as part of our trending products to sell online list. 

Refurbished items are reserviced items that are in ‘good as new’ condition. They sell for a decent margin, depending on the overall demand, and of course, your promotional campaigns. 

To that effect, try looking for such product retailers from Peshawar, Mardan, and other rural areas of Pakistan, where imported and branded electronic units usually show up for sale, from time to time. Refurbished products have a ‘check warranty,’ alluding to their working condition. 

Therefore, it’s your job to ensure that at the time of buying any refurbished item for resale purposes, works as advertised. 

For more information on best products to sell online in Pakistan, feel free to reach out to us.

14. Handcraft

The home décor market is a flourishing opportunity for craftspeople and artisans to showcase their exquisite handcrafted items.

Handmade items such as rugs, scarves, vases, and jewelry have long been prized for their unique beauty and intricate designs, offering both aesthetic appeal and incredible craftsmanship.

Artisans put in countless hours of effort to ensure each item meets the highest quality standards, allowing them to tap into the constantly growing demand for home décor essentials.

Lately, due to advancements in e-commerce technology, these local handcrafts are making appearances in all sorts of online stores.

This has greatly increased their reach; anyone with an internet connection can now purchase gorgeous handmade pieces from anywhere around the globe in just a few clicks.

As such, this has given aspiring craftspeople a platform to showcase their creations while also allowing people greater access to unique items that were previously limited geographically or otherwise inaccessible.

15. Textiles and apparel

Pakistan has a long-standing presence in the global textile and apparel industry, with exports forming a large portion of the country’s revenues throughout its history.

Textiles and garments account for up to 57% of total exports, while 32-35% of the industry’s sales derive from local apparel sales.

This includes a range of products such as women's clothing like gowns, men's clothing like t-shirts and suits, and also unsewn materials.

The textile industry produces many types of fabrics such as cotton, rayon, linen, silk, and wool. These fabrics are then woven into fabrics used to make different types of clothing items for women, men & children.

Pakistan’s domestic availability of cotton provides an ideal foundation for apparel manufacturing operations; it helps drive cost effectiveness while simultaneously providing opportunities for high-quality products with innovative designs.

The wide variety of fabrics gives customers plenty of choices when it comes to selecting apparel & also creates immense scope for business opportunities within this sector.

Through globalization initiatives, Pakistan is well positioned to capitalize on potential growth in global markets for both textiles and apparel production not only because of its vast natural resources but also due to its skilled workforce which can really help provide millions more jobs in the near future.

In light of that, the textile & apparel sector in Pakistan is expected to rise exponentially in the coming years and offers a great opportunity for entrepreneurs to tap into this lucrative industry and make a success out of their business venture.

16. Smart Watches

Smartwatches have become increasingly popular in recent years due to the amount of features they have.

Companies such as Apple and Samsung are leading the way by releasing high-tech smartwatches that offer a range of functions, from tracking health and fitness to playing music.

Smartwatches come in a variety of prices to suit different budgets, meaning that more people can enjoy their benefits.

With global sales continuing to rise, smartwatches are an essential product for businesses wishing to reach a wide market.

Businesses have quickly identified the potential of smartwatch technology for marketing purposes; users can now sync up with compatible mobile applications and even receive targeted ads straight to their wrist.

As well as this, social media platforms such as Facebook and Instagram are now accessible on many smartwatches, allowing users to stay connected without having to take out their phones.

For entrepreneurs looking to make money, there is no better time than now – adding smartwatches to their portfolio could bring them a great return on investment.

17. Bookends

As the physical world continues to take more of a backseat to digital media, there is still a passionate group of book lovers that enjoy the feel and look of their favorite paperbacks.

With the dawning of the Covid-19 pandemic, this has been amplified as people have turned in mass amounts to books for solace, entertainment, and escape.

As those same people explore shelving options for their new reading material, they would likely also be interested in unique and stylish bookends to prop up their favorite reads.

Bookends come in many shapes and sizes allowing prospective shoppers to find something perfect for them or as gifts for others.

For those that are relatively stylish-minded, there are modernly designed pieces that can bring an attractive pop of color or metallic accents to a plain wall shelf. For those who like more classic décor, traditional finishes like brass or bronze will do just the trick along with ornate sculptures or medallions embedded into them.

There is a longstanding educational element too; children’s bookends donned with popular characters from childhood stories can be found while antique-style replicas call forth memories of quaint libraries.

All these options make buying bookends an interesting prospect for store owners looking to capitalize on the demand for this product.

18. Laptop Stands

Laptop stands are a great way to make your work life more efficient and comfortable. Many people are now working remotely and spending more time at home with their families, so laptop stands provide the perfect solution for balancing work and family life.

Having an adjustable height that can accommodate any space and angle is also necessary for optimal laptop use. They also free up desk space for other items, like books or pet accessories.

The market value of laptop stands is expected to skyrocket from $91.76 billion in 2022 to $164.5 billion in 2030, which means there are plenty of profitable opportunities for eCommerce businesses who want to offer them as a product.

Aside from laptop stands, baby carriers are another good item to sell online considering the current trend of spending more time at home with children during the pandemic.

This sector currently has a value worth $280 billion with an expected annual growth rate of 7% until 2032.

Carriers give busy parents the freedom they need while keeping their babies safe and secure on their backs or chests without having to rely on strollers or car seats all day long.

Be sure to check out some of the most popular models so you know what kind of quality products work best for your store!

19. Car Parts

Pakistani consumers have become increasingly interested in car parts due to the rapid growth of the Pakistani automotive industry.

With constantly changing technologies and new models, the need for spare parts and accessories has grown significantly. As such, there has been an increase in demand for various types of car parts from different brands for numerous purposes.

Online stores that sell Pakistani car parts have become popular, offering a much wider variety of options than local shops and dealers.

These stores offer a wide range of genuine spare parts, from inexpensive items like lubricants to more expensive ones such as engines and suspension components.

The prices are reasonable considering the quality offered by these stores, making it easy for customers to find exactly what they’re looking for at an affordable price. As a result, many people in Pakistan are now preferring to shop online when purchasing car parts rather than going through traditional channels.

Turn this into income with Markaz

Markaz is Pakistan’s cash-on-delivery marketplace and three free ways to earn from home. Resell products with zero investment, start a dropshipping business with no inventory, or join the affiliate program and earn by sharing your link. Browse millions of products with cash on delivery across Pakistan, or buy factory-direct from China.

20. Phone Lenses

Phone lenses have been on the rise in recent years with more and more dropshipping stores capitalizing on the new trend. It is a great product for anyone looking to improve their photography on their phones.

External phone lenses allow photographers to capture optimized-images in an easier fashion, thanks to the number of shapes and settings that they come with.

This includes macro lenses, fish-eye lenses, wide-angle lenses, and telephoto lenses which help to draw closer details or record optimized-images from farther away.

For those selling phone lenses, it is important to only stock high-quality ones as bad-quality items can lead to dissatisfied customers.

Therefore, it is vital to research well when sourcing for external lenses and look out for models with a greater amount of orders so you know they are well-liked by shoppers.

Furthermore, use this opportunity as an advantage to see how other sellers are marketing their products toward potential customers and subsequently employ similar strategies in your store when possible.

21. Padel racket

Padel racket is a sport that has enjoyed tremendous growth over the last five years, with a search growth of 1,214%. The search growth of this product is exploding, and it has an average monthly search volume of 90.5K.

Padel rackets can cost anywhere from $60-$300 depending on the quality of the product, and it has become increasingly popular in countries such as the Netherlands, Norway, Belgium, UAE, and Sweden.

There are many different suppliers for padel rackets available on the market today including Kuikma, Dunlop, and HEAD. These suppliers all offer high-quality products that have excellent features such as lightweight design and robust construction.

As the popularity of this sport continues to rise worldwide, more people are searching for padel racket online which means more buyers resulting in additional sales for these manufacturers.

22. Car cams

Car cams have seen a meteoric rise in popularity over the past few years, as more and more drivers seek to record their trips on the road for safety reasons or to gather evidence in case of accidents.

The global search growth for car cams has increased by a whopping 26.5% year-on-year, which is likely due to greater awareness as well as an increase in features that they offer.

The price range for these devices ranges anywhere from $50 all the way up to $250 or even higher depending on one’s budget, though most are priced around $100 -$150 according to research.

With regards to the monthly search volume for car cams, estimates place this figure at around 1.3K. Suppliers include Garmin, Vantrue, and Nexar who have available models designed for various situations, making it easy for drivers to find one appropriate for them.

All-in-all car cams provide a great service as they make long drives less tedious while also providing 24/7 protection should any accidents occur along your travels; furthermore with features such as night vision capabilities, improved lens quality, and micro sd cards for storing data, they truly offer peace of mind no matter which supplier you pick.

23. Grow Bags in Pakistan

Grow bags are revolutionizing urban gardening in Pakistan. These portable fabric containers, available online and in stores, offer a convenient way to cultivate lush vegetables, herbs, and flowers in limited spaces like balconies and rooftops. Made from breathable materials like felt or non-woven fabric, grow bags promote healthy root growth by preventing circling and allowing for proper drainage. They're lightweight, easy to store, and come in various sizes to suit your needs.

Seeing Green with Online Selling:

The growing popularity of grow bags in Pakistan presents a lucrative opportunity for online sellers. Here's how you can tap into this trend:

  • Source your grow bags: Partner with local wholesalers or manufacturers who offer high-quality, durable options.
  • Embrace e-commerce platforms: Utilize established online marketplaces like Daraz.pk to reach a wider audience.
  • Showcase variety: Offer different sizes and colors to cater to diverse customer preferences. Consider including complementary products like seeds or fertilizer to create attractive bundles.
  • Leverage social media:  Promote your online store on Facebook, Instagram, and other popular platforms in Pakistan. Share informative content about the benefits of grow bags and target gardening enthusiasts.

Beyond the Basics:

While traditional grow bags are popular, variations exist to cater to specific needs. Look into options like:

  • Hanging grow bags: Ideal for vertical gardening on walls or balconies.
  • Potato grow bags: Feature ventilation flaps for better airflow, promoting healthy potato growth.
  • Strawberry grow bags: Elevated design keeps fruits clean and protects them from pests.

By capitalizing on the demand for grow bags in Pakistan and utilizing the power of online selling, you can cultivate a profitable business while helping people discover the joys of urban gardening.

24. Second Hand Shoes in Pakistan

Second hand shoes in Pakistan offer a treasure trove of possibilities for both budget-conscious buyers and savvy resellers. With a growing online market, capitalizing on this trend can be a smart way to earn extra income, especially by focusing on best selling products online.

Thriving on Pre-Loved Footwear:

The appeal of second hand shoes in Pakistan is undeniable. They offer quality footwear at a fraction of the retail price, making them a popular choice for cost-effective style.  However, to truly thrive in the online space, it's important to understand what resonates with Pakistani consumers. Here's a breakdown of some best selling products online in the realm of second hand shoes:

  • Popular Athletic Brands:  Brands like Nike, Adidas, and Puma consistently rank high in online searches. Look for gently used sneakers, running shoes, or trendy sports styles.
  • Classic Styles:  Timeless designs like loafers, oxfords, and brogues for men, or ballet flats, pumps, and boots for women, are always in demand. Focus on good condition and neutral colors for wider appeal.
  • Comfortable Walking Shoes:  With a growing health-conscious population, comfortable walking shoes from reputable brands like Skechers or Clarks see strong online sales.

Stepping into E-commerce:

The online world presents a goldmine for those looking to sell second hand shoes in Pakistan. Here's how to get started:

  • Source your shoes: Look for gently used footwear at thrift stores, garage sales, or even from friends and family. Authenticity is key, so focus on recognizable brands and good condition.
  • Shine Online: Partner with leading e-commerce platforms like Daraz.pk or utilize social media marketplaces like Facebook groups. High-quality photos showcasing the shoe's condition from various angles are crucial.
  • Highlight Best Sellers:  Clearly identify best selling products online in your descriptions. Use relevant keywords and categorize your shoes appropriately to ensure they reach the right audience.
  • Be Transparent: Clearly describe any imperfections and provide accurate sizing information. Building trust with potential buyers is key to success.

Standing Out from the Crowd:

While competition exists, there are ways to make your second hand shoe business stand out:

  • Offer niche categories: Cater to specific audiences by focusing on vintage finds, designer labels, or sports memorabilia.
  • Provide restoration services:  Consider offering cleaning or minor repairs for an additional fee, enhancing the value proposition.
  • Promote sustainable shopping: Highlight the environmental benefits of buying second hand and target eco-conscious consumers.

By understanding the market for second hand shoes in Pakistan, focusing on best selling products online, and leveraging the power of online selling, you can turn your passion for footwear into a profitable venture. Remember, with the right approach, pre-loved shoes can be your golden ticket to success in the e-commerce world!

25.Best Speakers Brand in Pakistan

Finding the best speaker brand in Pakistan can be tricky, but with a keen eye for what sells online, you can build a thriving business. Here's how to navigate the market and choose the best products for selling online:

The Audiophile's Playground:

Pakistan boasts a diverse range of speaker brands, each catering to specific needs and budgets. Here's a breakdown of some popular options:

  • International Powerhouses: Renowned brands like JBL, Sony, and Yamaha offer high-fidelity sound and cutting-edge technology. These are generally considered safe bets for online sales due to brand recognition.
  • Local Champions:  Don't overlook established Pakistani brands like Audionic and  Edifier. They often deliver excellent value for money and cater to local preferences.

Identifying Best Sellers Online:

While brand recognition plays a role, focusing on the best products for selling online is crucial. Here are some trending categories:

  • Portable Bluetooth Speakers:  Highly sought-after for their convenience and versatility. Look for features like water resistance and long battery life.
  • Wireless Soundbars: Ideal for space-saving home entertainment systems. Highlight features like Dolby Atmos compatibility and sleek designs.
  • Smart Speakers:  Voice-activated speakers like Google Home or Amazon Echo are gaining popularity. Focus on their smart home integration capabilities.
  • Computer Speakers: Cater to the work-from-home crowd with high-quality 2.1 speaker systems for enhanced audio experience.

Building Your Online Symphony:

Once you've chosen the right speaker brands and best products for selling online, leverage the power of e-commerce platforms like Daraz.pk or social media marketplaces. Here are some success tips:

  • High-Quality Listings:  Showcase your speakers with clear photos and detailed descriptions highlighting features and benefits.
  • Competitive Pricing:  Research the market to ensure your prices are attractive. Consider offering bundles with speaker wires or stands.
  • Targeted Marketing: Utilize social media advertising to reach audiophiles and tech enthusiasts. Highlight the unique selling points of each brand.
  • Customer Service Symphony:  Respond promptly to inquiries and offer excellent customer service to build trust and positive online reviews.

26. Best Selling Mobiles in Pakistan

Thinking about jumping into the Pakistani phone market?  It's a booming scene, but with so many options, picking the best selling mobile in Pakistan can feel overwhelming.  The good news is, you can turn that confusion into profit by focusing on good products to sell online!

Here's the thing: Pakistanis have diverse needs when it comes to phones.  Budget-conscious folks might be looking for a reliable daily driver, while tech enthusiasts crave the latest features.

So, what are some crowd-pleasers to consider selling online?

  • Flagship Fighters: Everyone loves a good brand name, right?  Phones from established players like Samsung's Galaxy S series or Apple's iPhones are always popular choices. They offer top-notch cameras, powerful processors, and sleek designs.  These might be pricier, but they're sure to grab attention.
  • Mid-Range Marvels: Don't underestimate the mid-range!  Brands like Xiaomi's Redmi phones or Oppo's Reno series offer fantastic features at a fraction of the flagship cost.  Think long battery life, decent cameras, and smooth performance - perfect for everyday use.  These are your sweet spot for good products to sell online, appealing to a wider audience.
  • Budget Champions:  Let's face it, affordability is key for many Pakistani phone buyers.  Brands like Infinix or Tecno offer fantastic value with features like large displays and big batteries at super competitive prices.  These might not have the fanciest specs, but they get the job done and won't break the bank.

Remember, selling online is all about giving your customers options!

Here's a tip: Partner with reselling platforms like Markaz.app or utilize social media marketplaces.  

Showcase high-quality photos, highlight key features in clear descriptions, and offer competitive pricing.

Start Selling with Markaz!

The Markaz App provides an easy platform for Pakistani entrepreneurs to start their online stores without any initial investment. With a user-friendly interface and a wide range of products to choose from, the Markaz App is perfect for anyone looking to start selling online. So what are you waiting for? Download the Markaz App today and get started on your own online business.
